
- Loads of benefits for exercise and mental performance/health. Most evidenced.
- 20g a day for mental performance, it's more than you take for just muscles

- Probably best after exercise. Some stomach discomfort if taken before exercise.

- Generally recommended and safe
-  Helps give you more energy for exercise and the mind
- Helps with testosterone
- Helps with mental health
- May make mania worse
- Good even when dieting

Hcl may or may not be better. Creatine monohydrate has been widely tested so just use that.

[Creatine 101 — What Creatine Does To Your Body and How It Works](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=inV_Jpb7nEo)

May help with pregnancy

20g a day may help with cognition and bone health
